name: Pot 'n Cot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. If using whole canned apricots, cut them in half.
2. Place the chuck arm pot roast in a large pot.
3. Add the apricots (halved) to the pot.
4. Incorporate the instant minced onion, marjoram, basil, pepper, cream or cooking sherry, and salt.
5. Cover and simmer on low heat until the meat is tender, typically 2-3 hours.
6. Once done, turn off the heat and serve.
